3063280.name: Starcrest
3063280.description:
About:

In 8000 BNE, humanity fled from the dying sun that was once a paradise teeming with life, in search of a new one.

Humans migrated to a star system in the Andromeda Galaxy called "Surya" and evolved into a race known as the Neumin, who thrived under a democracy for thousands of years.

However, the Neumin people came under the control of Niyo, a once brilliant and benevolent scientist.

The good-hearted Niyo was exposed to radiation from a black hole that mutated her personality and drove her to madness...

Gameplay Overview: Starcrest is a third‑person action-adventure game focused on fast melee combat, exploration across multiple planets, and a story‑driven progression system. Players control Alia as she travels between worlds, completes missions, and uncovers the truth behind the Niyo Empire.

Combat:

  • Real‑time melee combat using Alia’s blade, the Sudarshana

  • Dodge, parry, and combo‑based attacks

  • Energy abilities that enhance damage and mobility

  • Boss encounters against elite commanders and large mechanical enemies

Exploration:

  • Travel to several planets, each with unique environments and hazards

  • Navigate forests, deserts, oceans, floating cities, volcanic regions, and frozen wastelands

  • Solve environmental puzzles and interact with local species and factions

Progression:

  • Upgrade the Sudarshana with new energy modules and materials

  • Unlock new combat abilities as the story advances

  • Repair and improve your ship to access new areas

Structure:

  • Story missions set on different planets

  • A central hub ship, the Eclipse, used for upgrades and repairs

  • Optional tasks and side interactions available between missions
3063280.supported_languages:
英语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
